title: Accenture CUTS 11,000 Jobs for AI!
description:
A major wake-up call for the Indian IT sector. Accenture is laying off 11,000 employees in a massive strategic pivot to AI. They're aggressively upskilling, but staff who can't adapt will be let go. The number of jobs isn't shrinking, but the required SKILLS are changing fast. AI proficiency is no longer optional.
Is this the future of all IT companies? Let me know your thoughts.
